channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Zayn Kicks Back With ‘Konnakol’: Stream It Now
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: Welcome to the latest music update. If you're a fan of Zayn Malik, you'll be excited to know that the British pop singer is back with his fifth studio album, Konnakol. Released via Mercury Records and Island Records UK, this new collection features the previously-released track "Sideways" and lead single "Die For Me".
[Short music clip plays]
Host: Konnakol is Zayn's first album since 2024's Room Under the Stairs, which peaked at number 15 on the Billboard 200 and number 3 on the UK's Official Albums Chart. Zayn co-produced the new LP with Malay, a collaboration that dates back to his debut solo album Mind of Mine in 2016.
Host: To promote the new record, Zayn will be making his first late-night TV interview and performance on The Tonight Show with Jimmy Fallon on April 21st. He'll also appear on The Drew Barrymore Show on April 23rd, and kick off his largest solo tour to date on May 12th at the AO Arena in Manchester, England.
[Short music clip plays]
Host: The KONNAKOL Tour, produced by Live Nation, will visit major cities worldwide, including London, Los Angeles, and Miami. Zayn will be performing his new songs, including those from the album Konnakol, which takes its name from the art of performing percussion syllables vocally, a style found in South Indian Carnatic music.
Host: Zayn explains that the album title holds a deeper meaning for him, representing a sound that connects him to his heritage and his roots. With Konnakol, Zayn continues to push the boundaries of his music and explore his identity as an artist.
[Outro music plays]
Host: That's all for now. You can stream Zayn's new album Konnakol below. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll catch you in the next update.
